text: Hi, my name is Sandy, and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance. And we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding either right quote, may I ask how old you are? Maybe two. Sorry, I didn't catch that. You do currently have active auto insurance on your vehicle, correct? I do. My husband takes it out.
